issues.msg: Missing powerPreference: "high-performance" on WebGLRenderer
No shadow.bias set — may have shadow acne artifacts
No shadow.normalBias — can cause peter-panning
No post-processing pipeline — missing bloom, SSAO, color grading
No bloom effect — specular highlights look flat
No SSAO — missing contact shadows in crevices
No anti-aliasing pass — jagged edges visible at high res
No normal/bump maps — surfaces lack detail and depth
No environment map — surfaces lack reflections
No envMapIntensity tuning — reflections may be too strong or weak
No hemisphere light — missing sky/ground color bleed
physicallyCorrectLights not enabled — light attenuation is non-physical
No environment map — reflective surfaces will appear black
No geometry.dispose() calls — potential GPU memory leak
No anisotropic filtering — textures blur at oblique angles
No WebXR/VR support — can't be used in VR headsets
No VR entry button — users can't enter immersive mode
No camera controls — user can't look around
No sky/skybox — bland or black background
No error/warning logging — hard to debug issues
No .dispose() calls — textures/geometries leak GPU memory
Event listeners added but never removed — potential memory leak
No ARIA attributes — not accessible to screen readers
No WebRTC — no voice/video chat capability
No service worker — game doesn't work offline
